answers: Biohacking is the practice of using science, technology, and self-experimentation to optimize your body and mind. It ranges from simple diet and sleep changes to advanced techniques like intermittent fasting and cold exposure.

For beginners, biohacking can start simple: track your sleep, try intermittent fasting, practice cold showers, optimize your diet, and use blue-light blocking glasses. Always research thoroughly before trying anything advanced.

Biohacking ranges from safe lifestyle optimizations to risky DIY biology experiments. Start with evidence-based practices like sleep optimization and nutrition tracking. Avoid extreme measures without proper knowledge and always consult healthcare professionals for anything medical.
